broker_time_note: close_broker = ICMarkets server time = ET + 7h (constant). Compare to MQL5 TimeCurrent(). close_utc -> TimeGMT().
symbols_note: Match by base symbol; your broker may add a suffix (e.g. US500.cash) — match by prefix.
forex_note: Spot FX trades 24/5 — no exchange calendar. The only reductions are Christmas/New Year, published by ICMarkets (broker-specific). FX early closes are NOT in early_closes yet — pending the ICMarkets holiday-hours source.
